title: Raipur, Chhattisgarh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Raipur, Chhattisgarh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Raipur is a city in Chhattisgarh with a population of 1,200,000. The capital of Chhattisgarh, a rapidly growing industrial city known for its steel plants and mineral wealth.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
